metadata.title: ASK – Your student community at Arcada
metadata.description: Discover events, news, membership and student life at Arcada Student Union – ASK.

hero.title: More community. More opportunities. More student life.
hero.description: ASK represents Arcada students, creates memorable experiences and makes everyday student life easier — in English and Swedish.

community.title: Find your community
community.description: Meet people, join activities and make Arcada feel like home.

events.title: Never miss what is next
events.description: Discover upcoming events, gatherings and student experiences.

voice.title: Make your voice heard
voice.description: ASK advocates for students and helps improve life at Arcada.

news.title: News worth knowing
news.description: Updates, opportunities and practical information for your studies and student life.
news.empty: New stories are on the way.

events.title: Upcoming events
events.description: See what is happening next and find your place in the ASK community.
events.empty: There are no upcoming events published yet.

cor.title: Your campus living room
cor.description: A live view of today's and this week's activity at Cor is being prepared. Until then, explore ASK's published events.

collaborations.title: Collaborations that give more
collaborations.description: A curated directory of ASK partners and member benefits is coming soon. Interested organizations can already contact us.

membership.title: Join ASK and shape student life
membership.description: Membership connects you to the community, supports student advocacy and opens the door to ASK activities and benefits.

contact.title: Talk to ASK
contact.description: Have a question, an idea or need support? Reach the student union through the channel that works for you.

footer.description: ASK represents and connects Arcada students through advocacy, services, events and community.

news.title: News & Blog
news.intro: Updates, stories, and practical information from Arcada Student Union – ASK.
news.not_found: The article could not be found.

events.title: Events
events.intro: Upcoming and past events from Arcada Student Union – ASK.

not_found.title: This page has left the party.
not_found.description: The address may be incorrect or the page may have moved. Head back home or see what is happening next.
